welcome.title: Welcome.
welcome.subtitle: Let’s get you settled in. Self check-in takes about two minutes.
lookup.lastName.title: What’s your surname?
lookup.lastName.hint: We’ll find your reservation in seconds.
lookup.pickGuest.title: Which one of you is checking in?
lookup.pickGuest.subtitle: Tap your name to continue.
lookup.pickDate.title: When did you arrive?
lookup.pickDate.subtitle: Pick today’s arrival to find your stay.
lookup.byId.title: Enter your booking number
lookup.notFound.title: We couldn’t find a reservation.
lookup.notFound.body: Please come to the reception — we’ll take it from there.
scanner.title: Scan passport or ID
scanner.position: Place the bottom of your passport or ID inside the frame.
scanner.failed: Couldn’t read the document. Try again, or enter the details manually.
scanner.permission_denied: Camera access was denied. Enable it in your browser settings to scan, or enter your details manually.
external_scanner.title: Place your document on the scanner
external_scanner.placement_hint: Open your passport or ID at the photo page and slide it into the scanner.
external_scanner.writing_hint: Just a moment — we’re writing the details into your form.
field.title: Title
firm.dogPackage: We are travelling with a dog
firm.signatureHint: Please sign in the box below.
review.title: Almost done.
review.subtitle: Sign here to confirm and complete your check-in.
done.title: You’re all set.
done.subtitle: Your room is ready. Enjoy your stay.
error.title: Something went wrong.
error.body: Please come to reception so we can help you in person.
